programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama emerges as a contender in an arm-wrestling competition and goes up against a biker's equally tough mother.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Bubba must stand in for Luann's blind date.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi feels neglected when Vint decides to join an elite men's club.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama suspects Naomi of trying to cash in on Vint's life insurance policy.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama helps Aunt Effie recover from a concussion.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Bubba learns he has to attend night school to graduate high school; when it is revealed that Mama doesn't have her high school diploma, she joins him, but she is soon faced with the same problem she was some 40 years ago.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.sub-title: Zirconias Are a Girl's Best Friend
programme.desc: The Harpers hope to cure Mama of her addiction to home-shopping TV shows.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack escorts Janet to a stuffy, formal party.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack signs up for a computer dating service.

programme.sub-title: The Best of Three's Company - Part One
programme.desc: Lucille Ball is the host of this retrospective of the best scenes from the series' previous episodes.

programme.desc: Lucille Ball is the host of this retrospective of the best scenes from the series' previous episodes.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack strikes out as Janet's chaperon when he gets drunk and falls asleep.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri's boyfriend thinks Jack is the reason behind their breakup.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A jewel-thief date thinks Jack is a fence.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A newspaper article implies the trio's living arrangement is more than a practical one.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is the victim of a con game when he rents a decrepit restaurant.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and the crew are all set for the restaurant's opening night.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chaos results when Jack romances a Mexican girl.

programme.desc: The All Stars flex their funny bones in a stand-up comedy challenge in front of a live studio audience; guest judges Sam Richardson and Jane Krakowski.

programme.desc: For the final challenge before snatching a crown and a spot in the Drag Race Hall of Fame, the top all-stars must write, record and perform a verse of RuPaul's new single "Clap Back.".

programme.desc: Mama has a new outlook on life when she's almost hit by lightning.

programme.desc: Mama wants to sing at Raytown's Founder's Day.

programme.desc: Mama develops a crush on her night-school teacher (Joseph Campanella).

programme.desc: Iola discovers her handmade gifts to family members are being sold at the Harpers' garage sale.

programme.desc: A typical Russian homemaker visits the all-American Harper family.

programme.desc: A family war erupts when Vint and Naomi want to switch bedrooms with Bubba.

programme.desc: When Bubba comes home tipsy, Mama is reminded of a drunken incident involving Eunice.

programme.desc: Mama is jealous when Iola acquires a new best friend.

programme.desc: Jack dates one of Janet's friends from high school, unaware that she is married.

programme.desc: Jack is outraged when the building inspector demands a bribe.

programme.desc: Jack bets Janet and Terri that he can stay away from women for a week.
